Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The RemoveChildNodes method removes the specified set of IRenderableNode objects from the list of child nodes if present.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: void RemoveChildNodes(IRenderableNode* const* childNodes, size_t childNodeCount); void RemoveChildNodes(IRenderableNode::unique_ptr const* childNodes, size_t childNodeCount);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The set of IRenderableNode objects to remove from the list of child nodes
The number of IRenderableNode entries to read from the childNodes array
